notes: At first I had less than 1FPS, but I changed the game resolution a few times, and my problem was solved. Also the game crashed 2 minutes after it opened, I added PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 as start parameter and since then the game work very well. I only saw 1 or 2 graphics bugs
title: Shantae: Half-Genie Hero Ultimate Edition

notes: Got the 1 fps bug. Once i changed the resolution once in the menu the framerate was fine (back to 60). Noticed some minor graphic bugs in placed, but it's pretty much gold rated after the resolution change.
title: Shantae: Half-Genie Hero Ultimate Edition

notes: Using Proton 4.2-5:  Was running at 1fps with a garbled intro. Followed the advice of changing the resolution. After that the game runs flawlessly on both 32 and 64bit versions without the need to disable esync or the use of the PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 flags and even the company intro works as it should. Restarted a few times to see if it will regress, but the settings have held up.
title: Shantae: Half-Genie Hero Ultimate Edition
